parameters.jsCode:
const row = $input.item.json;
const checkName = row.check_name;

// Static command map for account-level checks
const commandMap = {
  "IAM_AUTH_CHECK":         "aws sts get-caller-identity --output json",
  "IAM_PASSWORD_POLICY":    "aws iam get-account-password-policy --output json",
  "IAM_ACCOUNT_SUMMARY":    "aws iam get-account-summary --output json",
  "IAM_USER_LIST":          "aws iam list-users --output json",
  "IAM_ROLES_LIST":         "aws iam list-roles --output json",
  "IAM_POLICIES_CUSTOM":    "aws iam list-policies --scope Local --output json",
  "IAM_GROUPS_LIST":        "aws iam list-groups --output json",
  "IAM_SAML_PROVIDERS":     "aws iam list-saml-providers --output json",
  "IAM_OIDC_PROVIDERS":     "aws iam list-open-id-connect-providers --output json",
  "IAM_VIRTUAL_MFA":        "aws iam list-virtual-mfa-devices --output json",
  "IAM_ACCESS_ANALYZER":    "aws accessanalyzer list-analyzers --output json",
  "IAM_CREDENTIAL_REPORT":  "aws iam generate-credential-report --output json",
  "IAM_SUPPORT_ROLE":       "aws iam list-policies --scope AWS --query \"Policies[?PolicyName=='AWSSupportAccess']\" --output json",
  "IAM_ROOT_ACCESS_KEYS":   "aws iam get-account-summary --query 'SummaryMap.AccountAccessKeysPresent' --output json",
  "VPC_LIST":               "aws ec2 describe-vpcs --output json",
  "VPC_FLOW_LOGS":          "aws ec2 describe-flow-logs --output json",
  "VPC_DEFAULT_SG":         "aws ec2 describe-security-groups --filters Name=group-name,Values=default --output json",
  "VPC_PEERING":            "aws ec2 describe-vpc-peering-connections --output json",
  "VPC_INTERNET_GATEWAYS":  "aws ec2 describe-internet-gateways --output json",
  "VPC_NACLS":              "aws ec2 describe-network-acls --output json",
  "VPC_SUBNETS":            "aws ec2 describe-subnets --output json",
  "VPC_ENDPOINTS":          "aws ec2 describe-vpc-endpoints --output json",
  "NETWORK_INTERFACES":     "aws ec2 describe-network-interfaces --output json",
  "ELASTIC_IPS":            "aws ec2 describe-addresses --output json",
  "SECURITY_GROUPS":        "aws ec2 describe-security-groups --output json",
  "EC2_VOLUMES":            "aws ec2 describe-volumes --output json",
  "EC2_DEFAULT_ENCRYPTION": "aws ec2 get-ebs-encryption-by-default --output json",
  "RDS_INSTANCES":          "aws rds describe-db-instances --output json",
  "CT_TRAILS_LIST":         "aws cloudtrail describe-trails --output json",
  "CT_EVENT_SELECTORS":     "aws cloudtrail describe-trails --query 'trailList[*].TrailARN' --output json",
  "CW_ALARMS_LIST":         "aws cloudwatch describe-alarms --output json",
  "CW_LOG_GROUPS":          "aws logs describe-log-groups --output json",
  "CW_METRIC_FILTERS":      "aws logs describe-metric-filters --output json",
  "CW_LOG_RETENTION":       "aws logs describe-log-groups --query 'logGroups[*].{name:logGroupName,retention:retentionInDays}' --output json",
  "SNS_TOPICS_LIST":        "aws sns list-topics --output json",
  "SNS_SUBSCRIPTIONS":      "aws sns list-subscriptions --output json",
  "GUARDDUTY_DETECTORS":    "aws guardduty list-detectors --output json",
  "GUARDDUTY_FINDINGS":     "aws guardduty list-detectors --output json",
  "SECURITYHUB_STATUS":     "aws securityhub describe-hub --output json",
  "SECURITYHUB_STANDARDS":  "aws securityhub get-enabled-standards --output json",
  "INSPECTOR_STATUS":       "aws inspector2 list-coverage --output json",
  "MACIE_STATUS":           "aws macie2 get-macie-session --output json",
  "AWS_CONFIG_RECORDERS":   "aws configservice describe-configuration-recorders --output json",
  "AWS_CONFIG_STATUS":      "aws configservice describe-configuration-recorder-status --output json",
  "AWS_CONFIG_RULES":       "aws configservice describe-config-rules --output json",
  "AWS_CONFIG_DELIVERY":    "aws configservice describe-delivery-channels --output json",
  "AWS_CONFIG_COMPLIANCE":  "aws configservice describe-compliance-by-config-rule --output json",
  "SECRETS_MANAGER_LIST":   "aws secretsmanager list-secrets --output json",
  "SECRETS_ROTATION":       "aws secretsmanager list-secrets --output json",
  "ACM_CERTIFICATES":       "aws acm list-certificates --output json",
  "ACM_EXPIRY_CHECK":       "aws acm list-certificates --query 'CertificateSummaryList[*].{Arn:CertificateArn,Domain:DomainName,Status:Status}' --output json",
  "SSM_PARAMETERS":         "aws ssm describe-parameters --output json",

  // ── PER-RESOURCE — uses stored identifiers from row ──
  "S3_ENCRYPTION":    `aws s3api get-bucket-encryption --bucket ${row.bucket_name} --output json`,
  "S3_VERSIONING":    `aws s3api get-bucket-versioning --bucket ${row.bucket_name} --output json`,
  "S3_LOGGING":       `aws s3api get-bucket-logging --bucket ${row.bucket_name} --output json`,
  "S3_PUBLIC_BLOCK":  `aws s3control get-public-access-block --account-id ${row.aws_account_id} --output json`,
  "S3_ACL":           `aws s3api get-bucket-acl --bucket ${row.bucket_name} --output json`,

  "RDS_ENCRYPTION":    `aws rds describe-db-instances --db-instance-identifier ${row.db_id} --query 'DBInstances[0].StorageEncrypted' --output json`,
  "RDS_PUBLIC_ACCESS": `aws rds describe-db-instances --db-instance-identifier ${row.db_id} --query 'DBInstances[0].PubliclyAccessible' --output json`,
  "RDS_BACKUP":        `aws rds describe-db-instances --db-instance-identifier ${row.db_id} --query 'DBInstances[0].BackupRetentionPeriod' --output json`,
  "RDS_MULTI_AZ":      `aws rds describe-db-instances --db-instance-identifier ${row.db_id} --query 'DBInstances[0].MultiAZ' --output json`,

  "IAM_USER_MFA":         `aws iam list-mfa-devices --user-name ${row.user_name} --output json`,
  "IAM_USER_ACCESS_KEYS": `aws iam list-access-keys --user-name ${row.user_name} --output json`,
  "IAM_USER_POLICIES":    `aws iam list-attached-user-policies --user-name ${row.user_name} --output json`,
  "IAM_USER_INLINE":      `aws iam list-user-policies --user-name ${row.user_name} --output json`,
  "IAM_USER_GROUPS":      `aws iam list-groups-for-user --user-name ${row.user_name} --output json`,

  "EC2_PUBLIC_IP":         `aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids ${row.instance_id} --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].PublicIpAddress' --output json`,
  "EC2_IMDSV2":            `aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids ${row.instance_id} --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].MetadataOptions' --output json`,
  "EC2_MONITORING":        `aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids ${row.instance_id} --query 'Reservations[0].Instances[0].Monitoring' --output json`,
  "EC2_SSM_AGENT":         `aws ssm describe-instance-information --filters Key=InstanceIds,Values=${row.instance_id} --output json`,
  "EC2_VOLUME_ENCRYPTED":  `aws ec2 describe-volumes --filters Name=attachment.instance-id,Values=${row.instance_id} --query 'Volumes[*].{ID:VolumeId,Enc:Encrypted}' --output json`,

  "CT_LOGGING_ENABLED": `aws cloudtrail get-trail-status --name ${row.trail_arn} --output json`,
  "CT_MULTI_REGION":    `aws cloudtrail describe-trails --trail-name-list ${row.trail_arn} --query 'trailList[0].IsMultiRegionTrail' --output json`,
  "CT_LOG_VALIDATION":  `aws cloudtrail describe-trails --trail-name-list ${row.trail_arn} --query 'trailList[0].LogFileValidationEnabled' --output json`,
  "CT_KMS_ENCRYPTION":  `aws cloudtrail describe-trails --trail-name-list ${row.trail_arn} --query 'trailList[0].KMSKeyId' --output json`,
  "CT_S3_BUCKET":       `aws cloudtrail describe-trails --trail-name-list ${row.trail_arn} --query 'trailList[0].S3BucketName' --output json`,

  "KMS_KEY_ROTATION": `aws kms get-key-rotation-status --key-id ${row.key_id} --output json`,
  "KMS_KEY_POLICY":   `aws kms get-key-policy --key-id ${row.key_id} --policy-name default --output json`,
  "KMS_KEY_METADATA": `aws kms describe-key --key-id ${row.key_id} --output json`,

  "LAMBDA_PUBLIC_POLICY": `aws lambda get-policy --function-name ${row.function_name} --output json`,
  "LAMBDA_ENV_SECRETS":   `aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name ${row.function_name} --output json`,
  "LAMBDA_VPC_CONFIG":    `aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name ${row.function_name} --query 'VpcConfig' --output json`,
  "LAMBDA_RUNTIME":       `aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name ${row.function_name} --query 'Runtime' --output json`,

  "LB_ACCESS_LOGS":         `aws elbv2 describe-load-balancer-attributes --load-balancer-arn ${row.lb_arn} --output json`,
  "LB_HTTPS_LISTENER":      `aws elbv2 describe-listeners --load-balancer-arn ${row.lb_arn} --output json`,
  "LB_DELETION_PROTECTION": `aws elbv2 describe-load-balancer-attributes --load-balancer-arn ${row.lb_arn} --output json`,
  "LB_SCHEME":              `aws elbv2 describe-load-balancers --load-balancer-arns ${row.lb_arn} --query 'LoadBalancers[0].Scheme' --output json`,

  "SQS_ENCRYPTION":    `aws sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url ${row.queue_url} --attribute-names KmsMasterKeyId SqsManagedSseEnabled --output json`,
  "SQS_PUBLIC_POLICY": `aws sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url ${row.queue_url} --attribute-names Policy --output json`,
  "SQS_DLQ_CONFIGURED":`aws sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url ${row.queue_url} --attribute-names RedrivePolicy --output json`,

  "ROLE_TRUST_POLICY":      `aws iam get-role --role-name ${row.role_name} --query 'Role.AssumeRolePolicyDocument' --output json`,
  "ROLE_ATTACHED_POLICIES": `aws iam list-attached-role-policies --role-name ${row.role_name} --output json`,
  "ROLE_INLINE_POLICIES":   `aws iam list-role-policies --role-name ${row.role_name} --output json`,
};

const cmd = commandMap[checkName];

if (!cmd || cmd.includes("undefined")) {
  return {
    ...row,
    cmd: null,
    skip: true,
    skip_reason: `No command mapping found for check: ${checkName}`
  };
}

return {
  ...row,
  cmd: cmd,
  skip: false
};
